creator: yuri@tsoft.com
text:
I actually solved this one with the help of the Warren Block from 
freebsd-questions@.

There was an option in xorg.conf in section "ServerFlags":
Option "AllowEmptyInput" "no"
Once I removed it and added:
Option "AutoAddDevices" "off"
the problem with freezing disappeared.

I am not sure if there is a bug that I stepped on, or this is expected. 
I don't know why "AllowEmptyInput"="no" interfered with hald, but it did.
I believe it shouldn't interfere.

Yuri
